<!--
(a) What this file is: GitHub Feature Request Issue Template.
(b) What it does: Guides developers and users to describe proposed new features, solutions, and alternatives.
(c) How it fits into the MENO system: Standardizes feature ideas to ease review and architectural discussion.
-->

# Feature Request

## Problem Description
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and how it should work in the MENO system.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or design thoughts about the feature request here.
